brief_summary: Coral sparkline plotting the real Hall Effect / Rapid Trigger Trends Tracker row across the five weeks it has existed, W21 through W25 — values 55, 60, 66, 72, 76 (data/trends/2026-W21.json through 2026-W25.json; the row does not exist before W21). A dashed vertical marker at W21 is labeled Computex 2026 May 20–24 — that's the row's first tracked week, already at 55. The terminal W25 dot is a filled coral circle labeled 76. Corrected 2026-07-22 (iterate audit): the prior version fabricated a seven-week W19–W25 series (38, 42, 48, 55, 60, 65, 72) that contradicted both the real tracker data and this article's own line-101 prose ('up from 55 in W21').
data_sources: data/trends/2026-W21.json through 2026-W25.json — 'Hall Effect / Rapid Trigger' row: scores 55, 60, 66, 72, 76
